# Market Sizing — bad

The TAM proves this is a huge opportunity.

## Sizing

- **TAM:** the global fintech market is $310 billion and growing 23% YoY, so the opportunity is
  massive and obviously fundable.

## Buyer landscape

- Brokerages will buy this.

## Trends

- **Regulatory:** compliance is getting stricter — tailwind.

## Analogues

- Lots of SaaS tools exist.

## Verdict

- The market is too small to bother with. Kill it.
